skill.name: faceswap
skill.description: AI Face Swap - Swap face in video, deepfake face replacement, face swap for portraits. Use from command line. Supports local video files, YouTube, Bilibili URLs, auto-download, real-time progress tracking.
skill.summary: AI-powered face swap service for videos and images with CLI interface
skill.author: verging.ai

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate face swap API client skill. The static findings reflect expected behavior: network calls to the verging.ai API service, environment variable access for API key authentication, and external command execution for video processing tools (yt-dlp, ffmpeg, curl). These are all necessary for the skill's core functionality. No malicious intent detected.

content.user_title: Swap Faces in Videos with AI
content.value_statement: Replace faces in videos using AI-powered face swap technology. Perfect for content creators who need quick face replacements without complex video editing software.
actual_capabilities: Swap faces in videos with a single face image
Download videos from YouTube and Bilibili for face swapping
Trim videos to specific time ranges before processing
Process videos in HD mode for higher quality output
Track job progress in real-time with status polling
limitations: Requires a verging.ai API key for authentication
Video duration limited to 30 seconds maximum
Credit-based system: 1 credit per second in normal mode, 3 credits per second in HD mode
Only processes one face swap at a time

use_cases.title: Content Creator Face Swap
use_cases.description: Replace protagonist faces in short video clips for content creation, tutorials, or social media posts
use_cases.target_user: Content creators, social media managers, video bloggers

use_cases.title: Video Editor Workflow Integration
use_cases.description: Quickly swap faces in video clips as part of a larger video editing workflow

use_cases.title: Personal Video Enhancement
use_cases.description: Swap faces in personal videos for fun or creative projects
use_cases.target_user: General users wanting to experiment with face swap technology

prompt_templates.title: Basic Face Swap
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the faceswap skill to swap the face in video.mp4 with the face from my-face.jpg
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to swap a face in a local video file

prompt_templates.title: YouTube Video Face Swap
prompt_templates.prompt: Use faceswap to swap the face in this YouTube video [URL] with the face from [image URL]. Download the result when complete.
prompt_templates.scenario: User provides YouTube URL and wants automatic download

prompt_templates.title: Trimmed HD Face Swap
prompt_templates.prompt: Use faceswap to swap faces in video.mp4 with face.jpg from second 5 to 15 in HD mode. Download the result.
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants specific time range with HD quality

prompt_templates.title: Batch Query Job Status
prompt_templates.prompt: Check the status of my recent faceswap jobs using the faceswap skill
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to check multiple job statuses

best_practices: Set your API key as an environment variable (VERGING_API_KEY) to avoid passing it on each command
Use the --start and --end options to trim videos before uploading, which saves time and credits
Check your credit balance before running long jobs to avoid interruption
anti_patterns: Do not share your API key in public repositories or chat messages
Avoid processing videos longer than 30 seconds as they will fail
Do not attempt to process videos with multiple faces - the service works with single face videos

faq.question: How do I get an API key?
faq.answer: Visit https://verging.ai, log in, click your avatar, select API Keys, and create a new key.

faq.question: How much does face swapping cost?
faq.answer: The service uses credits: 1 credit per second in normal mode, 3 credits per second in HD mode.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: The service accepts common video formats. Local files, YouTube URLs, and Bilibili URLs are all supported.

faq.question: Can I use YouTube videos directly?
faq.answer: Yes, just provide the YouTube URL as the --video parameter. The skill will automatically download the video using yt-dlp.

faq.question: How long does processing take?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on video length and server load. The skill polls for status every 5 seconds and reports progress.

faq.question: Is there a maximum video length?
faq.answer: Yes, videos are limited to 30 seconds maximum. Use --start and --end to trim longer videos.
